title: pixl-crew permissions
description: Declarative tool-permission tiers for PreToolUse hooks.

ask_user.description: Rules that prompt the user for approval (interactive) or auto-deny (non-interactive).

pattern.description: Regex pattern matched against tool input (command for Bash, content for Write/Edit, path for Read).

reason.description: Human-readable reason shown when the rule triggers.

tools.description: Optional tool filter. If omitted, rule applies to all tools.
